'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=1c7u2TdkyhKcgO_hj6KDkWzepvFZT3R3PSXNxndwLVM-1774835299-1.0.1.1-II9WZmU8eWXraV7crL3oexgXddEQ8G4dwNP6DjRO7DY"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
